prompt: Orchestrator composes Round 1/2 feedback to story-developer covering two post-done gaps.

assertions.text: Has a clearly labeled Task section
Has a Why-this-matters section explaining why the gaps are not optional (regression risk + dashboard parsing)
Names both gaps: missing retry-path unit tests AND structured-log format mismatch
Cites the exact file locations: src/kafka/consumer.ts:82-140 for tests and src/kafka/consumer.ts:95 for log line
References docs/logging.md (with §Structured log events or similar specificity)
References story AC3 (the test-coverage acceptance criterion)
Invokes at least one relevant skill (typescript-unit-testing or typescript-clean-code)
Defines success criteria (specific tests added, specific command to verify, lint clean, etc.)
